properties.name: 1976 Tangshan Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating earthquake that struck the industrial city of Tangshan in the early morning, destroying most of the city and causing one of the deadliest earthquakes in modern history.

properties.name: 1976 Guatemala Earthquake
properties.description: Major strike-slip earthquake along the Motagua Fault that devastated Guatemala City and surrounding areas, leaving over a million homeless.

properties.name: 1978 Tabas Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake that destroyed the city of Tabas in eastern Iran, killing most of its population and flattening nearly every structure.

properties.name: 1980 El Asnam Earthquake
properties.description: Destructive earthquake in northern Algeria that destroyed much of the city of El Asnam, triggering landslides and significant ground deformation.

properties.name: 1980 Irpinia Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake in southern Italy that caused widespread destruction across the Campania and Basilicata regions, exposing construction deficiencies.

properties.name: 1985 Mexico City Earthquake
properties.description: Massive subduction earthquake off the coast of Michoacán that caused catastrophic damage in Mexico City due to soft lake-bed soils amplifying seismic waves.

properties.name: 1986 San Salvador Earthquake
properties.description: Shallow earthquake directly beneath San Salvador that caused disproportionate damage and casualties relative to its moderate magnitude.

properties.name: 1988 Spitak Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating earthquake in northern Armenia that destroyed the city of Spitak and severely damaged Leninakan, prompting an international relief effort during the Soviet era.

properties.name: 1989 Loma Prieta Earthquake
properties.description: Major earthquake that struck during the World Series, collapsing a section of the Bay Bridge and the Cypress Street Viaduct in Oakland.

properties.name: 1990 Manjil-Rudbar Earthquake
properties.description: Destructive earthquake in northern Iran that obliterated the cities of Manjil and Rudbar, causing massive landslides in the Alborz mountain region.

properties.name: 1990 Luzon Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake on the Philippine Fault that caused extensive damage in Baguio City and Cabanatuan, triggering massive landslides.

properties.name: 1992 Flores Earthquake
properties.description: Major earthquake and subsequent tsunami that struck Flores Island, devastating coastal communities and causing massive destruction on Babi Island.

properties.name: 1994 Northridge Earthquake
properties.description: Blind thrust earthquake that struck the San Fernando Valley, causing widespread structural damage and becoming one of the costliest natural disasters in US history.

properties.name: 1995 Great Hanshin (Kobe) Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating shallow earthquake that struck Kobe, causing catastrophic damage to infrastructure and triggering fires across the densely populated port city.

properties.name: 1997 Qayen Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake in eastern Iran that destroyed numerous villages and the town of Birjand, occurring in a sparsely populated but vulnerable region.

properties.name: 1998 Afghanistan Earthquake
properties.description: Series of strong earthquakes in remote northeastern Afghanistan that devastated villages in Takhar Province, with rescue efforts hampered by the ongoing civil war.

properties.name: 1999 Izmit Earthquake
properties.description: Catastrophic earthquake along the North Anatolian Fault that devastated the industrial heartland of Turkey, causing fires at the Tüpraş oil refinery.

properties.name: 1999 Chi-Chi Earthquake
properties.description: Major thrust earthquake in central Taiwan that ruptured along the Chelungpu fault, causing massive ground displacement and widespread building collapses.

properties.name: 1999 Düzce Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake on the North Anatolian Fault occurring three months after the Izmit earthquake, further devastating northwestern Turkey.

properties.name: 2001 Gujarat Earthquake
properties.description: Massive intraplate earthquake on India's Republic Day that devastated the city of Bhuj and surrounding villages in the Kutch district of Gujarat.

properties.name: 2001 El Salvador Earthquake
properties.description: Major earthquake off the coast of El Salvador that triggered a massive landslide in Santa Tecla, burying hundreds of homes.

properties.name: 2003 Bam Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating earthquake that destroyed the ancient city of Bam, including its historic 2,000-year-old Arg-e Bam citadel, killing a quarter of the population.

properties.name: 2004 Sumatra-Andaman Earthquake
properties.description: Megathrust earthquake that triggered a catastrophic Indian Ocean tsunami devastating coastlines across 14 countries, one of the deadliest natural disasters in recorded history.

properties.name: 2005 Kashmir Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake in the disputed Kashmir region that devastated Muzaffarabad and Balakot, collapsing thousands of buildings and triggering massive landslides.

properties.name: 2005 Nias-Simeulue Earthquake
properties.description: Massive aftershock of the 2004 event off the west coast of Sumatra, causing further destruction on Nias and Simeulue islands.

properties.name: 2006 Yogyakarta Earthquake
properties.description: Shallow earthquake near Yogyakarta that destroyed thousands of homes and historic temples in one of Java's most densely populated regions.

properties.name: 2006 Kuril Islands Earthquake
properties.description: Major subduction earthquake in the Kuril Islands chain that generated a minor tsunami, but caused no casualties due to the remote and uninhabited location.

properties.name: 2007 Peru Earthquake
properties.description: Major earthquake near the coast of central Peru that devastated the city of Pisco, collapsing a cathedral during evening Mass.

properties.name: 2007 Sumatra Earthquakes
properties.description: Pair of massive earthquakes off the coast of southern Sumatra that triggered tsunami warnings across the Indian Ocean but caused limited casualties.

properties.name: 2008 Sichuan Earthquake
properties.description: Catastrophic earthquake in Sichuan Province that caused massive destruction across a wide area, with controversial collapses of school buildings sparking public outcry.

properties.name: 2009 L'Aquila Earthquake
properties.description: Destructive earthquake that struck the medieval city of L'Aquila, causing widespread collapse of historic stone buildings and leading to a controversial trial of seismologists.

properties.name: 2009 Sumatra Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake off the coast of Padang that caused severe damage in the city and triggered landslides that buried villages in the surrounding highlands.

properties.name: 2010 Haiti Earthquake
properties.description: Catastrophic shallow earthquake that struck near the capital Port-au-Prince, causing unprecedented destruction in a country with extremely vulnerable infrastructure.

properties.name: 2010 Chile Earthquake
properties.description: Massive megathrust earthquake off central Chile that generated a destructive tsunami, shifted the city of Concepción 3 meters to the west.

properties.name: 2010 Yushu Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake on the Tibetan Plateau that devastated the remote town of Jiegu, collapsing most structures built of traditional materials.

properties.name: 2010 Canterbury (Darfield) Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake west of Christchurch on a previously unknown fault that caused significant property damage but remarkably no direct fatalities.

properties.name: 2011 Tōhoku Earthquake and Tsunami
properties.description: Most powerful earthquake ever recorded in Japan, triggering a massive tsunami that devastated coastal cities and caused the Fukushima nuclear disaster.

properties.name: 2011 Christchurch Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating shallow aftershock of the 2010 Canterbury earthquake that struck directly under Christchurch during lunchtime, destroying the city's central business district.

properties.name: 2011 Van Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake in eastern Turkey that destroyed thousands of buildings in Van and the town of Erciş, followed by a deadly magnitude 5.6 aftershock.

properties.name: 2012 Indian Ocean Earthquake
properties.region: Off coast of Sumatra, Indian Ocean
properties.description: Largest recorded strike-slip earthquake in history that occurred off the coast of Sumatra, triggering brief tsunami warnings but causing minimal damage.

properties.name: 2013 Balochistan Earthquake
properties.description: Major earthquake in remote Balochistan that created a new island off the coast of Gwadar through a mud volcano eruption and destroyed thousands of homes.

properties.name: 2013 Bohol Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake in the Central Visayas that damaged numerous historic churches including the Basilica Minore del Santo Niño and displaced hundreds of thousands.

properties.name: 2014 Ludian Earthquake
properties.description: Shallow earthquake in mountainous Yunnan Province that triggered landslides and destroyed the town of Longtoushan, trapping thousands under rubble.

properties.name: 2014 Iquique Earthquake
properties.description: Major subduction earthquake off northern Chile in the seismic gap zone, generating a small tsunami but causing remarkably few casualties due to strong building codes.

properties.name: 2015 Nepal Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating earthquake that struck central Nepal, destroying historic monuments in Kathmandu's Durbar Square and triggering a deadly avalanche on Mount Everest.

properties.name: 2015 Illapel Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful subduction earthquake off central Chile that triggered a tsunami with waves up to 4.7 meters, prompting coastal evacuations.

properties.name: 2016 Ecuador Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake that struck the northwestern coast of Ecuador, devastating the towns of Pedernales and Muisne and causing severe damage in Portoviejo.

properties.name: 2016 Kumamoto Earthquakes
properties.description: Sequence of powerful earthquakes that severely damaged Kumamoto Castle and surrounding areas, with the main shock preceded by a strong foreshock two days earlier.

properties.name: 2016 Central Italy Earthquake
properties.description: Destructive earthquake that struck central Italy, nearly destroying the historic town of Amatrice and several surrounding villages in the Apennine mountains.

properties.name: 2017 Chiapas Earthquake
properties.description: Most powerful earthquake in Mexico in a century, striking off the coast of Chiapas and devastating the town of Juchitán de Zaragoza in Oaxaca.

properties.name: 2017 Puebla-Mexico City Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating earthquake on the anniversary of the 1985 disaster that collapsed buildings across Mexico City and Puebla, including a school where 19 children died.

properties.name: 2017 Iran-Iraq Border Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake along the Iran-Iraq border in the Zagros Mountains that caused widespread destruction in Kermanshah Province and was felt across the Middle East.

properties.name: 2018 Lombok Earthquake
properties.description: Series of destructive earthquakes on Lombok island that caused massive damage in northern Lombok and triggered landslides on Mount Rinjani.

properties.name: 2018 Sulawesi Earthquake and Tsunami
properties.description: Devastating earthquake followed by an unexpected tsunami and soil liquefaction in Palu, causing entire neighborhoods to be swept away by flowing ground.

properties.name: 2018 Anchorage Earthquake
properties.description: Strong intraslab earthquake that caused significant infrastructure damage including road collapses in Anchorage, but no fatalities due to robust building codes.

properties.name: 2019 Ridgecrest Earthquake
properties.description: Largest earthquake in Southern California in 20 years that created a visible surface rupture in the Mojave Desert and caused damage in the town of Ridgecrest.

properties.name: 2019 Albania Earthquake
properties.description: Strongest earthquake to hit Albania in decades, causing building collapses in Durrës and Thumanë and the deadliest earthquake in the country since 1979.

properties.name: 2020 Aegean Sea Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake in the Aegean Sea that caused building collapses in Izmir and a small tsunami that flooded the Greek island of Samos.

properties.name: 2021 Haiti Earthquake
properties.description: Major earthquake in southern Haiti that devastated the city of Les Cayes and surrounding areas, with rescue efforts hampered by Tropical Storm Grace.

properties.name: 2021 Assam Earthquake
properties.description: Strong earthquake in northeastern India that caused cracks in buildings and triggered landslides, the largest in the region since 1950.

properties.name: 2022 Afghanistan Earthquake
properties.description: Deadly shallow earthquake in southeastern Afghanistan that destroyed villages in remote mountainous terrain under Taliban governance, complicating international aid delivery.

properties.name: 2023 Turkey-Syria Earthquake
properties.description: Catastrophic earthquake doublet that struck southeastern Turkey and northern Syria, causing unprecedented destruction across 11 provinces and becoming Turkey's deadliest modern disaster.

properties.name: 2023 Morocco Earthquake
properties.description: Strongest earthquake in Morocco in over a century that devastated villages in the High Atlas Mountains and damaged historic structures in Marrakech.

properties.name: 2023 Herat Earthquakes
properties.description: Sequence of four strong earthquakes in Herat Province over two weeks that flattened entire villages, killing thousands in one of the most earthquake-prone regions.

properties.name: 2024 Noto Peninsula Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake on New Year's Day that devastated the Noto Peninsula, triggering a tsunami, fires in Wajima, and widespread building collapses.

properties.name: 1976 Moro Gulf Earthquake
properties.description: Massive earthquake and tsunami that struck the Moro Gulf near Mindanao, devastating coastal communities along the Cotabato coast.

properties.name: 1977 Vrancea Earthquake
properties.description: Deep-focus earthquake in the Vrancea seismic zone that caused catastrophic damage in Bucharest, collapsing numerous apartment buildings.

properties.name: 1983 Coalinga Earthquake
properties.description: Blind thrust earthquake that severely damaged the downtown area of Coalinga in the San Joaquin Valley, destroying many unreinforced masonry buildings.

properties.name: 1985 Valparaíso Earthquake
properties.description: Major subduction earthquake that struck central Chile causing widespread damage in Valparaíso and Santiago, and generating a tsunami along the coast.

properties.name: 1999 Armenia (Colombia) Earthquake
properties.description: Shallow earthquake in the Colombian Coffee Axis that devastated the city of Armenia and surrounding municipalities in Quindío Department.

properties.name: 2002 Hindu Kush Earthquake
properties.description: Deep earthquake in the Hindu Kush region that caused destruction across northern Afghanistan, adding to devastation during the post-Taliban transition period.

properties.name: 1993 Latur Earthquake
properties.description: Devastating intraplate earthquake in the stable continental region of peninsular India that destroyed the town of Killari, surprising seismologists.

properties.name: 2015 Hindu Kush Earthquake
properties.description: Deep earthquake in the Hindu Kush mountains felt across South Asia and the Middle East, causing casualties in Afghanistan, Pakistan, and India.

properties.name: 2016 Kaikōura Earthquake
properties.description: Complex earthquake that ruptured at least 12 faults simultaneously, isolating the town of Kaikōura by destroying road and rail links.

properties.name: 2024 Hualien Earthquake
properties.description: Strongest earthquake in Taiwan in 25 years that caused building collapses and landslides in Hualien, tilting the Uranus Building dramatically.

properties.name: 1987 Ecuador Earthquakes
properties.description: Two powerful earthquakes in the Amazon region that triggered massive landslides destroying a section of the Trans-Ecuadorian oil pipeline.

properties.name: 1991 Limón Earthquake
properties.description: Major shallow earthquake on the Caribbean coast of Costa Rica that uplifted coral reefs, destroyed bridges, and caused significant coastal changes.

properties.name: 2003 Boumerdès Earthquake
properties.description: Destructive earthquake east of Algiers that caused widespread building collapses and a tsunami in the western Mediterranean Sea.

properties.name: 2025 Myanmar Earthquake
properties.description: Powerful earthquake in central Myanmar that caused massive destruction in Mandalay and surrounding areas, collapsing thousands of buildings.

properties.name: 1979 Tumaco Earthquake
properties.description: Major subduction earthquake and tsunami on the Pacific coast of Colombia that devastated Tumaco and surrounding coastal communities.
